SIGNALIS is a 2022 indie survival horror video game developed by German duo rose-engine (consisting of Yuri Stern and Barbara Wittmann), and published by Humble Games, Balor Games and Playism. It takes place in a sci-fi retro-futuristic dystopian setting where the player follows Elster, a model of sentient android known in-universe as a Replika, as she explores the abandoned underground facility S23-Sierpinski. Its gameplay is primarily inspired by classic survival horror games Silent Hill and Resident Evil, while its art direction takes from creators like Hideaki Anno, Stanley Kubrick and David Lynch. The game involves solving various puzzles and engaging in combat when necessary to progress. It has a total of four known endings.
